/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libmotor_if__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libmotor_if__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/motor_if__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/motor_if/srv/detail/motor_pos__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/workspace/build/motor_if:/opt/ros/humble/install/lib: libmotor_if__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
